name: Jasmine Dream bath melt
description: A luxuriously moisturising bath melt infused with dreamy jasmine florals, designed to soften skin and fill the bathroom with an intoxicating, romantic scent.
archive_note: Released as part of the February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Valentine's subscription box
nostalgia_angle: Fluffy, cloud-like bubble bars are a Lush staple that fans adore for their generous mountains of bubbles and lingering scent
